sglang.title: fix: HiRadixCache: fix prefetch completion race
sglang.author: pabloiyu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
SGLang allows for hierarchical KV caching. Under the default storage prefetch policy best_effort, the scheduler doesn’t have to wait for prefetch to finish: it can proceed to stage the request, which terminates the prefetch early and inserts no pages from storage. To wait for prefetch, we

sglang.title: Fix get_ip when no external network
sglang.author: whybeyoung
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
When all worker nodes fail to connect to the external network, the current logic for retrieving the outbound IP becomes invalid and will return 0.0.0.0. To address this, we will add a fallback method to obtain the local IP via the hostname.
This fallback mechanism works by resolving the local hostna

sglang.title: Sets default model name in request classes
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Sets the default value of the model field to "default" in CompletionRequest, ChatCompletionRequest, EmbeddingRequest, and ScoringRequest classes.
This change ensures that if a model is not explicitly specified in a request, the system defaults to a pre-configured "default" model, preventing potentia

This PR adds a new class attribute supports_encoder_tp_data to SupportsMultiModal to indicate whether mm_encoder_tp_mode="data" is supported for a given model. If the user passes this argument for an unsupported model, we log a warning accordingly and fallback to r

vllm.title: Only run `get_attr_docs` if generating help text
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The docstrings for config class attributes are only actually needed if we're generating --help text or documentation.
This saves 235ms on my machine by completely eliminating the cost of extracting the docstrings on start up.

$ vllm serve --help
INFO 08-27 10:36:28 [__init__.py:241] Automatically d

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix for V1 priority scheduling crashes at preemption
vllm.author: Hanchenli
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
fix #23347
Purpose
This PR is to fix for #23347. The bug is due to that when requests are evicted due to low priority and not enough KV space, scheduled_running_reqs are not updated. This PR adds the line to update scheduled_running_reqs and an example test case for scheduler from #23346 .
Test Plan
